title: Refused Features
description: A mod that adds features that were refused by Mojang but the game definitely needs.
body:
# Refused Features 

This mod introduces several unique additions to Minecraft: vertical slabs, a shotgun, a duck, and a ring.  

## The Ring  
The ring allows you to "marry" a villager and will spawn a child as a result.  

![A player approaching a villager with a ring in hand.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/878d18efad19f27d1ab653cca006aac6de94cdec.jpeg)  

## Vertical Slabs  
Finally, vertical slabs are here! Build creatively with this long-awaited feature.  

![A vertical slab in Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2330c9c27447bceaa1e2da3f55a1d4f6fd93121.jpeg)  

## The Shotgun  
Despite Mojang's reluctance, this mod introduces a firearm into Minecraft. 

![A shotgun in Minecraft held by the player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eba529d5a4883b2ac29dd4ac8aab44228cb00d88.jpeg)  

## Watch the Creation  
This mod was created in the following video:
